name: Apple BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Rub meat with equal parts white pepper, paprika, chili powder, celery salt, and ground red pepper before cooking.
5. Baste the meat with half of the apple juice while it cooks.
6. Add the sauce during the last 15 minutes of cooking.
